item.title:

11 days before the Festival Irish track Bookmakers have been informed ther
item.description:
AK BETS @AKBets · 1h AK BETS @ PUNCHESTOWN
11 days before the Festival Irish track Bookmakers have been informed there will be no Premium areas outside of the ring this year.
An incredibly disappointing decision to a loyal bunch of sole traders who have sponsored numerous free entry gates. 8 2 20 8 mil
